name: Chicken Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine basil, seasoned salt, and pepper; add garlic powder. Set aside.
2. Place chicken between sheets of plastic wrap and pound to 1/4-inch thickness.
3. Sprinkle seasonings over each chicken breast and top with a slice of ham.
4. Roll up the chicken starting with the longest side.
5. Place rolls seam side down in a baking dish. Drizzle with lemon juice and sprinkle with paprika.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes. Chill.
7. Slice into 1/4-inch rounds, arrange on lettuce leaves, and garnish with cherry tomatoes.
